claim_boundary: The image-origin shift is natural and file-provenanced, while the frozen ResNet-18 encoder was pretrained on ImageNet. This tests release certification, not independent image recognition.
name: MOSAIC CINIC-10 natural-origin confirmation v1

protocol.primary_gate: at least 30 of 40 primary releases and zero held-out false acceptances
protocol.selection: minimum certified task error among candidates passing the primary contract, with candidate-key tie break
